decisions.title: Approve Test Results KPI Dashboard as Core Product Signal
decisions.context: ENG-9836 RFC in progress. Aligns with 'Signal>Evidence>Decision' strategy and Nail the Core pillar. Dashboards are evidence layer for decision-making.

arguments.for: Directly supports North Star metric by capturing engineering decisions at scale. Builds moat through embedded analytics.
arguments.against: May distract from Explore V2 completion. Resource allocation concern with FedRamp work in parallel.

decisions.title: Prioritize FedRamp Infrastructure Over Feature Development
decisions.context: ENG-10156 (AWS workspace provisioning) and GTM-117 (FedRamp lander) both active. Build the Moat pillar requires enterprise trust signals.
decisions.blockedBy: Security compliance review timeline unclear. Trust & Security webpage (GTM-107) dependency.

arguments.for: FedRamp unlocks government sector. High-value customer segment. Competitive moat through compliance.
arguments.against: Delays core product improvements. Family member features (ENG-9568, ENG-6405) getting deprioritized.

decisions.title: Consolidate Family Member Feature Set for Explore V2 Launch
decisions.context: 5 family-related tickets active (ENG-10063, ENG-9568, ENG-6405, ENG-7856, ENG-9537). Explore V2 is Nail the Core priority.

arguments.for: Family features enable multi-run analysis. Core to Explore V2 value prop. Increases decisions captured per session.
arguments.against: Scope creep risk. Each ticket adds complexity. May push Explore V2 GA date.

decisions.title: Approve LLM Gateway Deployment for Ask SIFT Enhancement
decisions.context: ENG-10162 (bifrost LLM gateway) ready. Ask SIFT is strategic bet. Embed Deeper pillar through AI-assisted analysis.

arguments.for: Accelerates Ask SIFT capabilities. Internal tooling proves value before customer deployment. Low risk infrastructure.
arguments.against: Adds operational complexity. LLM costs未明确. May need governance framework first.

decisions.title: Gate Explore V2 GA on Performance Benchmarks
decisions.context: ENG-10150 targeting 5M pts/sec. Current load testing in staging. Explore V2 performance critical for enterprise adoption.

arguments.for: Performance at scale is table stakes. Prevents customer churn. Validates infrastructure before GA.
arguments.against: May delay Explore V2 launch by 2-4 weeks. Sales pressure for Q2 feature announcement.

timeAudit.weekSummary: High meeting density due to FedRamp coordination, Explore V2 sprint planning, and cross-functional family feature alignment. Engineering RFCs requiring PM review.
alerts: Only 2 focus blocks today - insufficient for strategic thinking on 5 open decisions
32 meeting hours this week exceeds healthy threshold - consider declining non-critical syncs
3 RFCs awaiting decision (ENG-9836, ENG-10138, performance benchmarks) - schedule deep work Friday AM
FedRamp coordination creating meeting overhead - delegate to technical lead
GTM activities (web updates, event booth) pulling focus from core product decisions
